subject: Properties of Expectation
question: Let $X_1, X_2, X_3$ be independent discrete random variables with common probability mass function $\Pr(x) = \begin{cases} \frac{1}{3} & x = 0 \\ \frac{2}{3} & x = 1 \\ 0 & \text{otherwise} \end{cases}$ Determine the moment generating function $M(t)$, of $Y = X_1 X_2 X_3$.
